headlines.headline: Zelval Energy reports record quarterly revenue, up 18% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 18% provides strong positive fundamental momentum for the company.

headlines.headline: Talvix Holdings reports unexpected decline in Scandinavia revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected regional revenue decline signals potential operational or demand issues in a key market.

headlines.headline: Talvix Holdings files routine patent applications in data analytics

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
